default.$description: Default border radius for tab items - 6px, applied to top corners for line tabs

segment.$description: Border radius for segment tabs - 6px, applied to all corners

left.$description: Border radius for tabs positioned on the left side - rounded left corners only

right.$description: Border radius for tabs positioned on the right side - rounded right corners only

bottom.$description: Border radius for tabs positioned at the bottom - rounded bottom corners only

default.$description: Border width for default line tabs - 2px bottom border (active state)

bottom.$description: Border width for bottom-positioned line tabs - 2px top border (active state)

left.$description: Border width for left-positioned line tabs - 2px right border (active state)

right.$description: Border width for right-positioned line tabs - 2px left border (active state)

segment.$description: Border width for segment tabs - none (no border, uses background and shadow instead)

sm.$description: Padding for small tab - 4px vertical, 8px horizontal

md.$description: Padding for medium tab - 4px vertical, 8px horizontal

lg.$description: Padding for large tab - 4px vertical, 8px horizontal

sm.$description: Gap between icon and text in small tab - 4px

md.$description: Gap between icon and text in medium tab - 4px

lg.$description: Gap between icon and text in large tab - 4px

sm.$description: Minimum width for small tab to ensure adequate clickable area - 64px

md.$description: Minimum width for medium tab to ensure adequate clickable area - 80px

lg.$description: Minimum width for large tab to ensure adequate clickable area - 96px

sm.$description: Typography for small tab text - Medium weight, 13px/18px (Semibold when active)

md.$description: Typography for medium tab text - Medium weight, 14px/20px (Semibold when active)

lg.$description: Typography for large tab text - Medium weight, 16px/20px (Semibold when active)

default.$description: Default background for primary line tab - transparent

hover.$description: Background on hover for primary line tab - subtle blue tint

active.$description: Background for active primary line tab - light blue tint

focused.$description: Background when primary line tab is focused - subtle blue tint

disabled.$description: Background for disabled primary line tab - transparent
